name: Option premium payment date
description: For options transactions (including swaptions transactions), this data element reports the payment date of the option premium.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where Contract type is reported as OPTN or SWPT.
Required if Option amount is reported with a value greater than zero.
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types.
valueRules: For option premium amounts that are paid in instalments, Option premium payment date is reported as the date the first instalment is to be paid.
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
